Company: Hall: Booth: Title of exhibit or application: (max. 75 characters) Description of the exhibit/application for the printed version: (max. 160 characters. Explain what the exhibit shows or how the application is used. Please write in a non-promotional, informative style, avoiding exclamation marks, superlatives, etc.) (Please attach your logo as EPS file to your e- mail for the printed AAS Guide.) Entry in the AAS Guide for Hannover Messe 2026 (One form per exhibit or application) Please return the completed form to sabine.schilling@idtwin.org by 9 March. Weblink for further information on the exhibit or your organisation: Additional information for the digital AAS Guide Description of the exhibit/application for the digital version: (optional, max. 500 characters. Explain what the exhibit shows or how the application is used. Please write in a non-promotional, informative style, avoiding exclamation marks, superlatives, etc.) Contact information: (e-mail address, optional) Additional information: (e.g. planed presentations)
